description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear wireless headphones with a sleek, modern design. The headband is thick and padded, covered in a matte black material for comfort and durability. The ear cups are circular and large, with plush, cushioned pads that appear to be made of synthetic leather, providing noise isolation and comfort for extended use. The outer shells of the ear cups are finished in a dark metallic gray, giving the headphones a premium look. Small metallic hinges connect the ear cups to the headband, allowing for some adjustability and rotation. There are subtle buttons and ports on the ear cups, likely for power, volume, and connectivity, indicating the headphones are electronic and rechargeable.
description: A pair of modern, over-ear wireless headphones with padded black headband and metallic gray ear cups, featuring plush ear pads and subtle control buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing both padded ear cups and the thick, cushioned headband arching over the top.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the circular, metallic outer shell of the left ear cup and the hinge connecting it to the headband.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open space between the ear cups and the full curvature of the padded headband.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite side, showing the right ear cup's metallic shell and hinge detail.
